name: @gershy/clearing
description: Adds the features you always wish javascript had!
author: Gershom Maes

scripts.build: node ./build.js removeCmp && npm run build.cjs && npm run build.mjs && node ./build.js importSideEffects
scripts.git.pub: npm run test && git add --all && git commit -m "automated" && git push
scripts.npm.pub: npm run test && npm run build && npm publish --access public
